title: Dave's Cobbreeding Egg
description: Retextures the Cobbreeding eggs to be slightly more accurate to the Pokémon games.
body:
Replaces the Cobbreeding Pokemon Egg Texture with something slightly more game accurate.

Link to the Cobbreeding Mod, It's really nice:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding)
